@sigil v0 hybrid
G: webhook_skew_fix
C: abs(now-ts)>"300" ∧ returns("401") ∧ edge_rejects_valid
P: widen_tolerance ∧ allow_provider_skew ∧ keep_401_on_real_expiry
V: edge(-299s_200) ∧ edge(301s_401) ∧ no_regression
A: adjust_skew_check ∧ add_regression_test

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: grace24h_fix
C: overdue_implies_402 ∧ "24h" ∧ "402" ∧ boundary_charge_loop
P: encode_grace_window ∧ exclude_boundary ∧ gate_402_after_grace
V: edge(23h59m_ok) ∧ edge(24h00m_ok) ∧ edge(24h01m_402) ∧ no_charge_loop
A: adjust_overdue_check ∧ add_regression_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: grace24h_fix.
Constraints: overdue_implies_402 and "24h" and "402" and boundary_charge_loop.
Plan: encode_grace_window and exclude_boundary and gate_402_after_grace.
Verify: edge(23h59m_ok) and edge(24h00m_ok) and edge(24h01m_402) and no_charge_loop.
Answer target: adjust_overdue_check and add_regression_test.
